Whiteboard For Fun - Version : 0.01


I developed the site for fun. I designed it to work on PCs using a mouse or a touchpad. You can use touch and digital pen; however, there are still few glitches I did not resolve.

It works with the following browsers: Edge, Chrome, and Opera. It does not work well on FireFox.

Note! It based on my work at KueMinds (a company I cofounded three years ago). Some of the icons I used, were acquired by KueMinds from Icons8.

This site is developed by Raed Gharzeddine

Feel free to contact me on Linkedin.

Would you like to save the file before open a new file?
